properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v3 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will enter His gates with thanksgiving in my heart I will enter His courts with praise I will say this is the day that the Lord has made I will rejoice for He has made me glad

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He has made me glad, He has made me glad I will rejoice for he has made me glad He has made me glad, He has made me glad I will rejoice for he has made me glad

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hallelujah! He has made me glad, Hallelujah! He has made me glad, Hallelujah! He has made me glad, Hallelujah! He has made me glad.
